text:
POV: Monday motivation
hits different when
everything's under $50 💪
description: Motivational person in workout gear, morning light, energetic vibe, modern gym background, confident expression

text:
Wanted a fitness journal
for weeks but $40 felt
like too much to spend
description: Person browsing phone at desk, slightly frustrated, home office setup with fitness items visible

text:
Found it for $18.99
on Amazon today
Monday win unlocked 🤯
description: Excited person pointing at phone screen, shopping cart visible, laptop nearby, genuine happy reaction

text:
Same planner I was
eyeballing for weeks
Now it's in my cart 👇
description: Close up of fitness journal planner, hands holding it, modern aesthetic, warm lighting, product focus

text:
And Nike Pegasus 41
for under retail
From my eBay finds 🔥
description: Nike running shoes displayed on shelf, athletic aesthetic, clean modern background, product quality visible

text:
Fitness journal + gear
all under $50 today
Link in bio is your spot 💰
description: Organized fitness setup with journal, running shoes, water bottle, motivational quote in background, clean aesthetic
